statement: CISA's joint 'Careful Adoption of Agentic AI Services' (late 2025, co-authored by ASD ACSC + Five Eyes) is government-endorsed agentic-AI security guidance, but is adoption/risk guidance, not a packaged build-time agent-governance template like agent-enterprise.

evidence.quote: CISA, in collaboration with the Australian Signals Directorate's Australian Cyber Security Centre (ASD's ACSC) and other partners, released guidance ... 'Careful Adoption of Agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI) Services'

falsifier: If CISA/ASD shipped an actual deployable agent-governance template or reference repo (not just principles), this 'not a template' framing would be falsified.

control_anchor.control_id: Careful Adoption of Agentic AI Services
